calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by self represented plaintiff. There being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to APR-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jan-08-2019-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Continued To Sep-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance by Plaintiff. Plaintiff counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Sep-25-2018 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-07-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
